title: galactia australis
intro: Galactia australis, also known as the Australian milkpea, is a plant species in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat wounds, fever, and rheumatism. The health benefits of Galactia australis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional herbal preparations, such as tinctures and creams.
